title: PLP Redesign: Fulfillment Availability on Product Cards
description: Redesigned search and category page (PLP) product cards on ace.com to surface real-time pickup availability and fulfillment type selection without requiring a product detail page visit. Introduced contextual in-store availability messaging, 'Ready in 15 Minutes' curbside pickup indicators, nearby store inventory callouts, and lazy-loaded fulfillment sections on each card — giving store-aware customers the information they need to make faster, more confident purchase decisions directly from browse pages.

title: PLP Redesign Phase 2: Nearby Store & Cart Fulfillment
description: Completed the full product card fulfillment redesign across ace.com — extending nearby store inventory logic to a new 'Get It Here' button on product cards, updating store name and label conventions consistently across cart and PDP, and introducing inline fulfillment controls that allow customers to switch fulfillment store without navigating away. Improved fulfillment context at the cart stage reduced abandonment and maintained purchase completion rates through a complex UX transition.

title: Same-Day Delivery Store Selection
description: Redesigned the delivery store selection experience in the purchase side tray, surfacing contextual messaging that helps customers compare speed vs. cost trade-offs when choosing a fulfillment location. Introduced per-mile fee transparency for customer-paid radius orders and enabled a geo-targeted same-day delivery pilot at select locations.

title: Bundles & Kits: Kit Shopping Experience
description: Introduced a new product type on ace.com enabling customers to browse and purchase pre-built hardware kits and product bundles. Delivered new kit-specific category pages on Acenet, updated search and category page integrations to surface kits in top-of-funnel discovery, and built product family data structures to support accurate pricing and availability.

title: Buy Now Pay Later & Digital Wallets
description: Launched Buy Now Pay Later and digital wallet payment options at checkout, giving customers flexible financing for larger purchases. Introduced new payment method selection UI, inline installment plan previews, and streamlined digital wallet authentication — reducing friction on the payment step for high-AOV orders.

title: Fraud Detection Migration: Riskified
description: Completed migration from the legacy fraud detection platform to Riskified, including full PayPal API modernization from SOAP to REST. Streamlined the checkout approval flow to reduce false declines, automated chargeback handling, and resolved edge cases affecting Canadian billing addresses and split BOGA orders — improving order success rates across payment types.
